# Script modification for statistical tests and contrasts (2026-01-21 21:14Z)

2. the test for main effect Age
3. the test for main effect Condition (=treatment)
4. the 4 pairwise relevant contrasts, i.e.

Age 30, r vs c
Condition c, 10 vs 30
Condition r, 10 vs 30
